title: rubus radicans
intro: Rubus radicans, also known as the creeping raspberry or running raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to treat wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Rubus radicans include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues.
